message:
fix: Add label filter to technical-doc-writer workflow

Only run when issue has 'doc update' label to avoid unnecessary executions

files.patch:
@@ -28,6 +28,7 @@
 #   issues:
 #     types: [opened, labeled]
 #   workflow_dispatch:
+# if: contains(github.event.issue.labels.*.name, 'doc update')
 # permissions: read-all
 # engine: copilot
 # tools:
@@ -233,7 +234,7 @@ run-name: "technical-doc-writer"
 jobs:
   activation:
     needs: pre_activation
-    if: needs.pre_activation.outputs.activated == 'true'
+    if: (needs.pre_activation.outputs.activated == 'true') && (contains(github.event.issue.labels.*.name, 'doc update'))
     runs-on: ubuntu-slim
     permissions:
       contents: read
@@ -7141,6 +7142,7 @@ jobs:
           if-no-files-found: ignore
 
   pre_activation:
+    if: contains(github.event.issue.labels.*.name, 'doc update')
     runs-on: ubuntu-slim
     outputs:
       activated: ${{ steps.check_membership.outputs.is_team_member == 'true' }}

@@ -5,6 +5,7 @@ on:
   issues:
     types: [opened, labeled]
   workflow_dispatch:
+if: contains(github.event.issue.labels.*.name, 'doc update')
 permissions: read-all
 engine: copilot
 tools:
